channel.title: GreenWall on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in GreenWall on Nature Works

item.title: Ivy wall
item.description:
Ivy is a fantastic wildlife plant but do watch out where it’s growing

Ivy (Hedera helix) is a fantastic wildlife plant (supporting over 106 species of insect, as evergreen habitat, for its flowers and its berries. http://localhost:1313/blog/240129-ivy-wall/
